caribbean.headline: Roatan Braces for Heavy Rain and Building Seas
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is tracking 88% rain probability with winds reaching 22 kt and significant wave heights building to 5.6 ft under a dominant NE swell with 8-second periods. This moisture-laden system will bring the most substantial rainfall and roughest conditions across the western Caribbean today, with Martinique in the Lesser Antilles experiencing calmer conditions at 13 kt winds by comparison.

mediterranean.headline: Marseille Faces Moderate Winds, Seas Remain Manageable
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing 28 kt winds with significant wave heights of 2.6 ft and a 5 second southern swell, conditions well within normal operational parameters for the Central Mediterranean. Less than 10% rain probability keeps precipitation concerns minimal across the region today.
